description: First publish with an Idempotency-Key on a registry that advertises supports_idempotency_key=true. Registry MUST execute the full §2.1 pipeline and return HTTP 201 Created with the standard publish response and Location header. The (agent_id, Idempotency-Key, content_hash, response) record MUST be durably recorded atomically with the body (RFC-ACDP-0003 §6.2.1).

input.body_summary: Valid first-version PublishRequest signed by did:web:agents.example.com:test-producer with content_hash sha256:H1.

expected.response_shape: Standard publish response (RFC-ACDP-0003 §4): exactly the five fields ctx_id, lineage_id, version, created_at, status.
post_publish_invariants: GET /contexts/{ctx_id} returns the body byte-identically to what was signed.
An idempotency record exists for (agent_id, idem-key-AAAA, sha256:H1, <stored_response>) and survives a registry restart.
